Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0B9E "CLASSICADVENTURE-9000-0B9E" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $9000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Classic Adventure.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $9000 to set the correct screen colour before starting the game.
